payload.claim_text: The Structural Rehab and Overcoat Painting at 180th Street project schedule slipped to September 2026, due to underperformance of the painting subcontractor. The general contractor unilaterally terminated the subcontractor and is reletting two new painting subcontractors.

C&D recently opened five new elevators - two at Jackson Heights-Roosevelt Avenue/74th Street station in Queens and three at Fordham Road station in the Bronx. In total, 31 elevator replacements have been completed so far this year.
Improvements across all performance metrics for Buses in October, with the 12-month average continuing to trend upward.

A key rule change allowed installation of an inter-track barrier, enabling round-the-clock weekend work without requiring stoppages when trains passed on adjacent tracks. This innovation has already produced approximately $48 million in efficiencies and is being replicated across multiple projects.

records.display_name: A and L Line Service Increase Announcement

payload.claim_text: Increased weekday service on the A and L lines. Governor Hochul's recent announcement of weekday service increases. Improvements made possible by prior capital investments including three new substations on the L Line between 2020 and 2022.

records.display_name: Grand Central Subway Station Improvement Completion

payload.claim_text: The Grand Central subway station improvement program, a five-year initiative, was completed $46.5 million under budget. The program expands circulation capacity by 20 percent, including a new passageway to the 7 Line through bedrock excavation at 42nd Street and Lexington Avenue, 14 new staircases, 10 replaced escalators and 4 elevators, over 3,000 square feet of concrete repair, and 35,000 square feet of new flooring.

records.display_name: Park Avenue Viaduct Phase One Completed

payload.claim_text: Park Avenue Viaduct replacement Phase One was completed in October with full superstructure renewal. Phase Two substructure work for Track 4 was completed in June. The project achieved $93 million in savings and was delivered 51 months ahead of schedule without a single train delay.

records.display_name: St. Albans Station ADA Ribbon Cutting

payload.description: Cut ribbon at St. Albans Station, the latest LIRR station to become ADA accessible. 18-month project brought station into the 21st century with modern look and new amenities.
payload.event_name: St. Albans Station ADA Accessibility Ribbon Cutting

payload.description: Metro-North's eighth heritage series locomotive, designed by a committee of twelve veterans along with Emily Moser, to honor all branches of the US Armed Services. Unveiled at North White Plains.
Annual On-Track Safety Summit with representatives from Metro-North, NJ Transit, PATH, Keolis, Amtrak, and MBTA to discuss and align on shared safety challenges.
Capital Program Committee meeting from 12:45 - 1:45 PM ET
85th year since opening of Queens Midtown Tunnel in 1940. Designed by Ole Singstad, construction took 2,500 sandhogs through solid rock. President Franklin D. Roosevelt rode first automobile through.
payload.event_name: 85th Anniversary of the Queens Midtown Tunnel

payload.raw_value_text: Weekend ridership also remained strong, surpassing 2019 levels at 102.5%
nearly 96% of weekday trips met the 30 minute on-time performance standard
nearly $64 million dollars owed collectively to all member agencies
more than 850,000 trips to Yankee Stadium, including three record-breaking games averaging about 14,000 riders per game

records.display_name: NYCT Paratransit First Million Trips Month

payload.raw_value_text: first month ever in which paratransit completed more than one million trips

payload.scope: CBTC Fulton Liberty design-build contract to LK Comstock & Company LLC

payload.raw_value_text: 13.9% reduction in crime compared to October of last year

payload.description: Modification No. 9 to Contract B40666-2 for purchase of 219 low-floor 40-foot Option Buses (161 diesel-electric hybrid and 58 clean diesel) from New Flyer of America, Inc.

payload.raw_value_text: 4.2% reduction in crime when comparing January through end of October of this year to the same time period last year
more than 1,400 arrests, 63,000 summonses, and 5,800 vehicles towed

records.display_name: LIRR October Monthly Ticket Ridership Increase

payload.raw_value_text: increased by 9.9% compared to last October
Year-to-date total ridership is 9.2% higher than 2024

records.display_name: CBTC Fulton Street and Liberty Avenue Lines

payload.description: Design-build contract awarded to LK Comstock & Company LLC to replace nearly century-old fixed-block relay-based signal system on NYCT's Fulton Street Line and Liberty Avenue Line with CBTC system. Includes track switch repairs, wireless network cabling, tunnel lighting replacement. 25-year maintenance contract to Siemens Mobility Inc. $1,390,000,000 design-build + $151,821,383 maintenance.
payload.project_name: CBTC on Fulton Street and Liberty Avenue Lines

payload.description: Upgrades to power distribution systems at BWB (interconnecting service building with bridge feeds, new redundant electrical feeder, standby generator) and VNB (substation upgrades, PLC controls, lane use signal system). Substantial completion forecast December 2025. Budget $84.7M.
payload.project_name: Power Redundancy and Resiliency Improvements at Bronx-Whitestone Bridge and Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

records.display_name: TNB Tower Fender Protection and Painting

payload.description: Replacement of existing tower ship collision protection system to meet AASHTO guidelines, tower painting, rehabilitation of tower elevators, main cable and suspender rope work. Budget $197.8M. Contractor: Trevcon Construction Co. Inc. Construction began December 2023. Ahead of schedule.
payload.project_name: Tower Fender Protection and Painting at the Throgs Neck Bridge

records.display_name: ADA Package 9 - Briarwood, Parsons Blvd, Gates Avenue

payload.description: Design-build contract awarded to Forte Construction Corp. for ADA upgrades at three NYCT stations including seven new elevators and state of good repair work, with 15-year elevator maintenance contract to Mid-American Elevator Co. Inc. $169,950,000 design-build + $12,248,000 maintenance.
payload.project_name: ADA Upgrades Package 9: Briarwood Station (F, E), Parsons Boulevard Station (F), Gates Avenue Station (J, Z)

records.display_name: Lower Level Suspended Span Deck Rehabilitation at VNB

description: Concrete deck repairs, complete repaving, finger joint rehabilitation, substructure steel repairs, electrical and painting work, weigh in motion system installation

Extend the useful life of the 56 year old lower-level deck of the VNB. Includes concrete deck repairs, complete repaving, finger joint rehabilitation, substructure steel repairs, electrical and painting work, weigh-in-motion system installation, FDNY fiber optic communications work.

Concrete deck repairs, complete repaving of lower level suspended span roadways, finger joint rehabilitation, substructure steel repairs, electrical and painting work, weigh-in-motion system installation at VNB. Completed September 2025, three months ahead of schedule. Budget $109.6M.
project_name: Lower Level Suspended Span Deck Rehabilitation at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge Lower Level Suspended Span Deck Rehabilitation

records.raw_text: Extend useful life of 56 year old lower-level deck of VNB - $109.6M, approximately 15% complete, completion forecast December 2025

payload.description: Reconstruction of Brooklyn approach viaducts to VNB including reconfiguration to right-hand exit ramps to Belt Parkway for improved safety and traffic flow. Budget $536.0M. Contractor: VNB Construction Company. Construction began August 2025.
payload.project_name: Reconstruction of Upper-Level Brooklyn Ramps at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge Phase 2

records.display_name: Tower Painting, Lighting and Electrical Upgrades at VNB

description: Cleaning and painting of bridge exterior towers, suspender ropes and main cable collars; lighting and electrical upgrades including new tower floodlighting system, interior lighting, navigation lights replacement, new tower feeder cables, new electrical panels and transformers, and seismic retrofit repairs at tower cable bases.

Cleaning and painting of bridge's exterior towers, suspender ropes, and main cable collars; lighting and electrical upgrades including new tower floodlighting, interior lighting, navigation lights, new tower feeder cables, electrical panels, transformers, and seismic retrofit repairs at tower cable bases
Complete exterior painting of the almost 700 foot high VNB towers, removing original lead based paints, including steel repairs and electrical work at the tower locations.

Complete exterior painting of VNB towers (removing lead-based paints), suspender rope painting, steel repairs and electrical work. Budget $146.2M. Contractor: Ahern Painting Contractors Inc. Construction began December 2023.
project_name: Tower Painting, Lighting and Electrical Upgrades at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
Tower Painting and Electrical Upgrades at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

payload.description: Cleaning and painting of bridge exterior towers, suspender ropes and main cable collars; lighting and electrical upgrades including new tower floodlighting system, interior lighting, navigation lights replacement, new tower feeder cables, new electrical panels and transformers, and seismic retrofit repairs at tower cable bases.
payload.project_name: Tower Painting, Lighting and Electrical Upgrades at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge

records.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Tower Painting, Lighting and Electrical Upgrades at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge - $128,525,518

payload.description: Install dehumidification system on four main cables of VNB to preserve cable strength and extend service life. Also includes cable band bolt replacement, main cable inspection, messenger cable replacement, obstruction lights replacement, acoustic monitoring system. Budget $320.6M. Contractor: Skanska Koch, Inc. Awarded July 2025.
payload.project_name: Main Cable Dehumidification at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge (VN-8Q)

records.display_name: Fire Suppression at Hugh L. Carey and Queens Midtown Tunnels

payload.description: Design-build contract awarded to Navillus Tile Inc. d/b/a Navillus Contracting for expansion of high-pressure water mist fire suppression system at Hugh L. Carey Tunnel and new system at Queens Midtown Tunnel, plus ceiling ventilation exhaust port repairs. Includes 5-year maintenance contract. $138,252,750 design-build + $9,970,000 maintenance.
payload.project_name: Fire Suppression System at Hugh L. Carey and Queens Midtown Tunnels

records.display_name: ADA Upgrades at 42nd St-Bryant Park & Fifth Avenue Station Complex

payload.description: Design-build contract awarded to Paul J. Scariano, Inc. for ADA upgrades at 42nd Street-Bryant Park and Fifth Avenue Station Complex (B, D, F, M, 7, S) including four new elevators, with 15-year maintenance contract to Mid-American Elevator Co. Inc. $84,662,000 design-build + $5,746,000 maintenance.
payload.project_name: ADA Upgrades at 42nd St-Bryant Park & Fifth Avenue Station Complex

records.display_name: FDR Drive Widening at RFK Bridge

payload.description: Improving RFK bridge connection to south-bound FDR Drive, allowing two lanes from RFK to continue onto SB FDR Drive unimpeded. Includes replacement of pedestrian overpass with ADA compliant bike/ped overpass. Budget $32.0M. Contractor: Defoe Corporation. Construction began June 2025.
payload.project_name: FDR Drive Widening at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge

payload.description: Structural upgrades on RFK Bridge suspended spans including anchorage structures, main cable dehumidification, overcoat painting, enforcement grade weigh-in-motion system. Improves aerodynamic performance and pedestrian/bicycle access. Budget $513.7M. Contractor: American Bridge-Commodore, JV. Construction began December 2023.
payload.project_name: RFK Bridge Suspended Span Retrofit and Painting
